faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Castle Hill homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies in Castle Hill homes typically breed in the organic matter that accumulates inside drains, pipes, and sewage systems. Older plumbing common in many Castle Hill residences, combined with moisture buildup, creates perfect breeding grounds. Our treatment targets these source areas to eliminate the infestation completely.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Castle Hill properties take 1-2 hours depending on the size of your home or business and the severity of the infestation. Our technicians thoroughly treat all affected drains, apply bio-enzymatic cleaners, and may use growth regulators to prevent future breeding. You'll typically see significant reduction within 24-48 hours.

faqs.question: Is drain fly treatment safe for my Castle Hill apartment building?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments are completely safe for residential buildings in Castle Hill. We use EPA-approved products and bio-enzymatic solutions that break down organic matter without harsh chemicals. Our methods are safe for children, pets, and building residents, and we can coordinate treatments to minimize disruption in multi-unit properties.
